author: Dexterity104
title: Budget-aware batched audit: whole-codebase coverage in 3 calls
notes: Designed for the per-problem inference budget (3 calls / 24k output tokens). Packs several ranked contracts into each of the 3 calls so it covers far more of the codebase than a one-contract-per-call agent, audits each batch against a high/critical checklist, stops cleanly on HTTP 429, and emits a few confidence-ranked, matcher-shaped findings.
